questions.question: Super Hornet is a fighter aircraft manufactured at which country?
questions.explanation: The marine version of the French-made Rafale fighter jet has been successfully flight-tested at a shore-based facility in Goa. The Rafale-M competes against the US-made Super Hornet, as both of which are being evaluated for a purchase by the Indian Navy for deployment on INS Vikrant. It is a 44,000-tonne indigenously developed aircraft carrier, that is undergoing trials for commissioning in August.

questions.question: Which Indian bank sponsors the ‘Atmanirbhar Bharat Centre of Design (ABCD)’?
questions.explanation: A tripartite MoU has been signed between State Bank of India, Indira Gandhi Centre for the Arts and National Culture Fund for developing ‘Atmanirbhar Bharat Centre for Design’ at Red Fort, Delhi. The ABCD project is being implemented by IGNCA, an autonomous organization under Ministry of Culture. The project aims for Economic Value Addition to GI products. It will also provide a platform for artisans and designers, to provide a wide market.

questions.question: What is the theme/slogan of the ‘World Cancer Day 2022’?
questions.explanation: World Cancer Day is observed every year on February 4. The theme for World Cancer Day 2022 is ‘Close the Care Gap’. According to a Lancet Oncology study, India reports about 1.3 million cancer cases annually and eight per cent of total deaths. This is likely to increase in the next 5-10 years due to delay in diagnosis and treatment during the COVID-19 pandemic.

questions.question: Which state has announced to hold its first-of-its kind ‘Leopard Census’?
questions.explanation: The Assam Forest Department has announced to hold first-of-its kind leopard census in the state. The city of Guwahati is witnessing increasing leopard-human friction, due to rapid infrastructure development. The Census will map the leopard’s habitat and establish standards to be followed for infrastructure development.

questions.question: Who is the only contestant from India, in the Beijing Winter Olympics 2022?
questions.explanation: Arif Khan, who will be competing in the Slalom and Giant Slalom events, is the only contestant from India, in the Beijing Winter Olympics 2022. India announced a diplomatic boycott of the Beijing Winter Olympics, after the honour of carrying the Olympic torch went to a Chinese soldier who was wounded in the Galvan clash two years ago.

questions.question: Which is the venue of the 2028 Olympic Games?
questions.explanation: Los Angeles is the venue of the 2028 Olympic Games or the 2028 Summer Olympic Games. It is being referred as LA28. Paris is the venue of 2024 Olympic Games. Recently, the International Olympic Committee has approved a proposal to include surfing, skateboarding and sport climbing among the core sports for the 2028 Summer Games in Los Angeles.

questions.question: China along with which country declared a “No limits” partnership, to collaborate against the West?
questions.explanation: China and Russia “No limits” partnership, backing each other over standoffs on Ukraine and Taiwan. They also promised to collaborate more against the West. This was declared President Xi Jinping hosted President Vladimir Putin on the opening day of the Winter Olympics at Beijing. The countries also agreed to work together on space, climate change, artificial intelligence and control of the internet.

questions.question: Which State signed MoU with Ather Energy to set up 1,000 fast charging stations for Electric two-wheelers?
questions.explanation: A Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed between the Karnataka State Government and Ather Energy to set up 1,000 fast charging stations for electric two-wheelers across the state. The agreement was signed between Ather Energy and Electric supply companies (ESCOMs). Ather Energy will provide free charging services for electric two-wheeler vehicles. ESCOMs would be the nodal agencies to provide all technical support for the charging stations

questions.question: Which freedom fighter was the founder of the ‘Hindustan Republican Association’?
questions.explanation: Revolutionary Sachindra Nath Sanyal He was the founder of the Hindustan Republican Association also known as Hindustan Socialist Republican Association. His 80th death anniversary was observed recently. He was a mentor for revolutionaries like Chandrasekhar Azad and Bhagat Singh. He along with Rashbehari Bose attacked Viceroy Hardinge while he was entering Delhi. Sanyal was imprisoned for his involvement in the plans for the Ghadar Conspiracy.

questions.question: ‘Majhi Vasundhara’ campaign is associated with which state?
questions.explanation: UN Environment Programme (UNEP) has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Maharashtra government to support its ‘Majhi Vasundhara’ campaign. Majhi Vasundhara’ (My Earth) is an initiative of the Government of Maharashtra’s Environment and Climate Change Department, to empower citizens with knowledge on the impacts of climate change and environmental issues.
